section_subtitle: A selection of automation solutions delivered across different industries.

items.title: Medication Data Sanitization
items.description: Automated end-to-end sanitization of medication records across 3 separate client databases. The bot retrieves divergence spreadsheets from UiPath Orchestrator Buckets, segregates data using Queues, and processes each database independently. Reduced sanitization errors and freed up resources for higher-complexity tasks.
items.impact: Reduced data errors & optimized resource allocation

items.title: Health Plan Contract Registration
items.description: Most complex project in the portfolio. Built an AI-powered pipeline to extract clauses, tables, and structured data from extensive health plan contracts, followed by automated registration of the plan in the client's system. AWS services handled data preparation and extraction; UiPath drove the registration workflow.

items.title: SAP Contract Adjustment Automation
items.description: UiPath bot that navigates SAP to extract contract data and applies business rules for adjustments. Workflow spans multiple systems: SAP for data extraction and updates, SharePoint for file storage, and Outlook for automated email notifications throughout the process.

items.title: Commercial Area Invoice Registration
items.description: Power Automate flow serving the commercial team. Retrieves data from email-delivered sources, triggers an AI model (built by a partner team) for extraction, structures the output into a standard format, routes it for end-user approval, and upon approval posts the data directly into SAP.
items.impact: Straight-through processing from email to SAP

items.title: SAP File Distribution – Commercial
items.description: Daily Power Automate routine for the commercial area that monitors a SAP transaction, extracts relevant business files, and automatically routes them to the correct stakeholders via Outlook — eliminating manual file distribution.

items.title: SharePoint-to-SAP Financial Updates
items.description: Daily Power Automate routine for the Finance area. Monitors a SharePoint repository fed by the client; when new items are detected, applies extraction and business rules, then updates SAP records with the processed adjustments.

items.title: Employee Health Plan Enrollment
items.description: Weekly Power Automate routine for HR. Checks SAP for newly registered employees and automatically enrolls them in the health plan portal via web browser automation, ensuring new hires receive their benefits without manual intervention.
items.impact: Zero-touch benefits enrollment for new hires

items.title: Monthly Tax Account Closing
items.description: Monthly Power Automate routine for the Tax area. Accesses the designated SAP transaction, applies all required business rules, and executes the month-end account closing — ensuring compliance and reducing manual effort at period close.

items.title: IT Governance Approval Workflow
items.description: Power Automate integration for the IT Governance area. Whenever a new ticket is opened in ServiceNow, the flow automatically triggers a Teams Approvals request to the responsible approver and updates the ticket status via ServiceNow API — keeping governance workflows fast and traceable.

items.title: SAP & SAP Ariba Master Data Sync
items.description: Daily Power Automate routine for the Master Data team. Exports and filters data from SAP, navigates SAP Ariba to perform required verifications, and reconciles both systems by updating SAP records — keeping master data consistent across platforms.

items.title: Cross-System Data Comparison & Reporting
items.description: Power Automate flow that extracts data from multiple sources and an external website, performs automated comparisons between the datasets, generates a consolidated discrepancy report, and delivers it to the client via email.
items.impact: Automated reconciliation reports delivered to stakeholders
